text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while preparing to head home after
training...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Look. The stars are so pretty.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
The breeze is so refreshing, and there's no one
else on the track.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Would it be all right if I continued running a
little?
choice_data_list: Go take in the night scenery.
It's pretty close to curfew, you know.
It's pretty close to curfew, you know.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Would it be all right if I continued running a
little?
choice_data_list: Go take in the night scenery.
It's pretty close to curfew, you know.
It's pretty close to curfew, you know.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Such a wonderful view... How could I not?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Silence Suzuka spends the remainder of her
available time running around the track beneath
the starlit sky.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Huh? I-is it that time already?

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I'll have to run home—Oh, well, I suppose I get to
run either way...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Silence Suzuka rushes off back to the dorms.
